// storeInfoInHeader niyo ibikurikira mu mutwe w'igisubizo cya HTTP usanzweho hakurikijwe ubwoko bwagenwe.
Uyu murimo ugenzura ubwoko bw'ibikurikira: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Bihabwa imfunguzo 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', na 'Cache-Control', mu buryo bukurikira.
Ibikubiye mu makuru bisomwa mu bisabwa n'abakoresha.
Niba ubwoko bw'amakuru bwasobanuwe ari bwo, umutwe w'igisubizo wavuguruwe ugomba kubigira. Niba hari ikitagenda neza, uyu murimo ugomba gusubiza umutwe w'igisubizo wa mbere nta mpinduka.

Args:

infoType (string): Ubwoko bw'amakuru bwo kubika mu mutwe.
infoContent (string): Ibikubiye mu makuru byo kubika mu mutwe.
header (map[string]string): Umutwe w'igisubizo usanzweho.

Returns:

map[string]string: Umutwe w'igisubizo wavuguruwe ufite amakuru abitswe.func storeInfoInHeader(infoType string, infoContent string, header map[string]string) map[string]string {
// Nugire urupfunguruzo rwa RSA rwigenga, ururungike mu buryo bwa PEM, maze urusubize nk'umunyururu.func CreatePrivateKey() string {

// Hindura amakuru n'umufunguzo ukoresheje uburyo bwa CBC.
Amabyte y'umufunguzo yatanzwe ari ndende (>= amabyte 64) kuri algorithimu zose za AES na DES.
Hitamo algorithimu imwe gusa yo gukora kandi ukoresheje inyandiko y'ibanze y'amabyte y'umufunguzo yatanzwe ihuye n'uburebure bukenewe.
NTUZAGIRE hitamo algorithimu hashingiwe ku burebure bw'umufunguzo.
Subiza amakuru yahindutse, IV (vegtari y'ibanze), n'umufunguzo wakoreshejwe mu guhindura.
Ibivugwa:
- key: Amabyte yo kuzana umufunguzo w'ubuhinduzi.
- data: Amakuru yo guhindura.
Gusubiza:
- Amakuru yahindutse, IV, n'umufunguzo wakoreshejwe mu guhindura. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)func encryptData(key, data []byte) ([]byte, []byte, []byte, error) {

/* Urwo rupapuro ruzokwerekanwa mu mpapuro za HTML iyo umukoresha amaze kwinjira. Urwo rupapuro ruzokwerekanwa mu buryo bwa "Welcome, <username>!" Imvugo: - username: Izina ry'umukoresha. */
func getWelcomeMessage(username string) string {

/* Verengera amakuru n'ijambo ry'ibanga ukoresheje AES na mode ya CBC.
Ijambo ry'ibanga ryatanzwe rifite uburebure buhagije (>= 64 bytes). Koresha igice cy'ijambo ry'ibanga ryatanzwe gihura n'uburebure busabwa.
Subiza amakuru y'ibanga, IV (ikimenyetso cy'ibanze), n'ijambo ry'ibanga ryakoreshejwe mu gucunga.

Arguments:
- key: Amaboko yo gukora ijambo ry'ibanga (byibuze 16 bytes).
- data: Amakuru yo gucunga.

Returns:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): Amakuru y'ibanga, IV, n'ijambo ry'ibanga ryakoreshejwe mu gucunga. */
func encryptData(key []byte, data []byte) (encryptedData []byte, iv []byte, aesKey []byte) {
